name: Asana
philosophy: Asana's web presence is project-management-as-flow chrome — a coral-orange primary (#fc636b), gentle dot-pattern brand mark (referencing the three-dot 'Asana' icon), and illustration-driven heroes featuring teams in motion. The atmosphere is friendly productivity SaaS: warm, optimistic, and committed to 'work without the chaos.' Cards round at 8–16px and the chrome leans into approachable enterprise.

design_language.motion_signature: Gentle workflow-themed micro-animations — task cards have a subtle hover lift, the three-dot brand mark may pulse on landing. Carousel transitions use 300ms ease-in-out. The brand reads as friendly-productive.

trademark_signals: Asana coral (#fc636b) — the chromatic voltage on CTAs and the wordmark
Three-dot brand mark — circular triad referencing teams in coordination
Friendly illustration heroes — teams collaborating, task boards in action
Soft rounded cards (8–16px radius) — approachable enterprise
Workflow-themed visual language — gantt timelines, kanban columns, task-card mockups
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace Asana coral with a saturated red — the specific warm coral is brand
Don't sharpen card radii below 8px — friendly SaaS softness
Don't strip the three-dot brand mark — it is the brand identity anchor
Don't sanitize the workflow-illustration heroes to generic enterprise stock
